---
title: "LRPLF03: Factors associated with the level of expressive vocabulary (E)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPLF03 is a **level-factors** model for expressive vocabulary (`eowpvt`): what is associated with the score *level* at each of the four timepoints (Beta-Binomial logit, child random intercept; no own baseline).

_Causal labelling + level-model crossover caveat._ Every non-randomised coefficient is an **adjusted association** under the DAG. The group effect is `group x time` (a per-timepoint coefficient `b_grp_time[t]`, trajectory divergence): after t2 the waitlist crosses over, so the **clean randomised contrast lives only at t2** (`b_grp_time[1]`, labelled *causal*); t3/t4 are post-crossover cohort/timing terms. SES excluded (non-DAG / redundant).

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the level count, $N = 170$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu_{t} = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + b_{\text{grp}[t]}\text{group} + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + g_{\text{ability}[t]}z(\text{blocks}) + \gamma_{\text{grp\_ability}}\,\text{group}\,z(\text{blocks}) + u_{\text{child}}$.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_results_factors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
